
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Wood Monkey|kanji=甲申|romaji=kinoe saru|onyomi=kōshin|p=jiǎshēn|w=chia-shen|mi=ʈ͡ʂja̠²¹ ʂən|y=gaap6 san1|j=gaap6 san1|ci=kaːp̚ ʂɐn|mc=kæp ʂin|oc-bs=kaːp ʔʂin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Wood Monkey also known as 甲申''' (kinoe saru, kouboku no saru, koushin) is one of the elements of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}.

It is the 21st combination of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|ja|六十干支|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary cycle|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=干支|1=Sexagenary cycle|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q246658}}, preceded by {{ill|Kiboku|ja|1=Yin Water Goat|2=ja|癸未|1=Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kiboku|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Water Goat|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Otyuu|ja|1=Yin Wood Rooster|2=ja|乙酉|1=Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otyuu|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Wood Rooster|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the context of {{ill|Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|ja|陰陽五行思想|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Yang Five Elements Thought|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} symbol {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood|ja|Wood (木)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|lt=Wood (木)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood|13=User:Immanuelle/Wood (wuxing)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|2=uk|3=Дерево (елемент)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=Mộc (Ngũ hành)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=மரம் (சீன மெய்யியல்)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (木)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, while the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} symbol {{ill|Monkey (zodiac)|en|Monkey (zodiac)|qid=Q740674|lt=Monkey (申)|1=Monkey (zodiac)}} represents yang {{ill|Metal|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|1=Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|lt=Metal (金)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal|13=User:Immanuelle/Metal (wuxing)|ja|Metal (金)|1=Metal (wuxing)|lt=Metal (金)|2=es|3=Metal (Wu Xing)|4=it|5=Metallo (elemento)|6=vi|7=Kim (Ngũ hành)|8=tr|9=Metal (klasik element)|10=uk|11=Метал (У-сін)|lt=Metal (金)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, establishing a restraining relationship ({{ill|Mutual Restraint|ja|五行思想#相剋（そうこく）|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mutual Restraint|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}) (i.e. Metal overcomes Wood).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): jiǎshēn
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaap3 san1
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kinoe-saru
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gap sin (갑신)
** Vietnamese (Hán-Việt): Giáp Thân

==Years of Yang Wood Monkey==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 24 when divided by 60 is a {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Yang Wood Monkey (甲申)'s years table'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 24|en|AD 24|qid=Q23857|lt=24 AD|1=AD 24}}
* {{ill|AD 84|en|AD 84|qid=Q30398|lt=84 AD|1=AD 84}}
* {{ill|AD 144|en|AD 144|qid=Q33149|lt=144 AD|1=AD 144}}
* {{ill|204|en|204|qid=Q30571|lt=204 AD|1=204}}
* {{ill|264|en|264|qid=Q30484|lt=264 AD|1=264}}
* {{ill|324|en|324|qid=Q31407|lt=324 AD|1=324}}
* {{ill|384|en|384|qid=Q48076|lt=384 AD|1=384}}
* {{ill|444|en|444|qid=Q33433|lt=444 AD|1=444}}
* {{ill|504|en|504|qid=Q30262|lt=504 AD|1=504}}
* {{ill|564|en|564|qid=Q32557|lt=564 AD|1=564}}
* {{ill|624|en|624|qid=Q33247|lt=624 AD|1=624}}
* {{ill|684|en|684|qid=Q31128|lt=684 AD|1=684}}
* {{ill|744|en|744|qid=Q23608|lt=744 AD|1=744}}
* {{ill|804|en|804|qid=Q29998|lt=804 AD|1=804}}
* {{ill|864|en|864|qid=Q25041|lt=864 AD|1=864}}
* {{ill|924|en|924|qid=Q23651|lt=924 AD|1=924}}
* {{ill|984|en|984|qid=Q23840|lt=984 AD|1=984}}
|
* {{ill|1044|en|1044|qid=Q19349|lt=1044 AD|1=1044}}
* {{ill|1104|en|1104|qid=Q12490|lt=1104 AD|1=1104}}
* {{ill|1164|en|1164|qid=Q19674|lt=1164 AD|1=1164}}
* {{ill|1224|en|1224|qid=Q5402|lt=1224 AD|1=1224}}
* {{ill|1284|en|1284|qid=Q5544|lt=1284 AD|1=1284}}
* {{ill|1344|en|1344|qid=Q6073|lt=1344 AD|1=1344}}
* {{ill|1404|en|1404|qid=Q6121|lt=1404 AD|1=1404}}
* {{ill|1464|en|1464|qid=Q6552|lt=1464 AD|1=1464}}
* {{ill|1524|en|1524|qid=Q6309|lt=1524 AD|1=1524}}
* {{ill|1584|en|1584|qid=Q6728|lt=1584 AD|1=1584}}
* {{ill|1644|en|1644|qid=Q6920|lt=1644 AD|1=1644}}
* {{ill|1704|en|1704|qid=Q6824|lt=1704 AD|1=1704}}
* {{ill|1764|en|1764|qid=Q7659|lt=1764 AD|1=1764}}
* {{ill|1824|en|1824|qid=Q6994|lt=1824 AD|1=1824}}
* {{ill|1884|en|1884|qid=Q7819|lt=1884 AD|1=1884}}
* {{ill|1944|en|1944|qid=Q5268|lt=1944 AD|1=1944}}
|
* {{ill|2004|en|2004|qid=Q2014|lt=2004 AD|1=2004}}
* {{ill|2064 AD|ja|2064年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2064|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2064 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2060年代|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2124 AD|ja|2124年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2124|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2124 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2184 AD|ja|2184年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2184|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2184 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22世紀|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2244 AD|ja|2244年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2244|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2244 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23世紀|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2304 AD|ja|2304年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2304|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2304 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24世紀|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2364 AD|ja|2364年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2364|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2364 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2424 AD|ja|2424年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2424|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2424 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2484 AD|ja|2484年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2484|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2484 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2544 AD|ja|2544年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2544|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2544 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2604 AD|ja|2604年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2604|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2604 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2664 AD|ja|2664年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2664|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2664 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2724 AD|ja|2724年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2724|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2724 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2784 AD|ja|2784年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2784|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2784 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2844 AD|ja|2844年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2844|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2844 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2904 AD|ja|2904年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2904|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2904 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2964 AD|ja|2964年|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2964|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2964 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}
===Events===
* In {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|qid=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 19 ({{ill|1884|en|1884|qid=Q7819|lt=1884 AD|1=1884}}) – the {{ill|Kapsin Coup|en|Kapsin Coup|qid=Q488282|lt=Koushin Coup|1=Kapsin Coup}} took place.

==Months of Yang Wood Monkey==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 0 or 5 (when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Kou|ja|甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|lt=Kinoe (甲)|2=ja|3=甲|4=zh|5=甲|1=Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kou|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (甲)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|lt=Kinoto (乙)|2=ja|3=乙|4=zh|5=乙|1=Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (乙)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|July|en|July|qid=Q121|lt=July|1=July}} is designated as the {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}} of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. However, here the term "month" may refer either to the month of the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or to the {{ill|Solar term|en|Solar term|qid=Q1190993|lt=Solar term|1=Solar term}} (from {{ill|Liqiu|en|Liqiu|qid=Q1147421|lt=Beginning of Autumn|1=Liqiu}} until the day before {{ill|Bailu (solar term)|en|Bailu (solar term)|qid=Q1191003|lt=White Dew|1=Bailu (solar term)}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Wood Monkey==
The {{ill|selected day|ja|選日|1=Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/selected day|13=User:Immanuelle/Senjitsu|qq=}} for {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is as follows.

=== Selected Day (選日) ===
The day of {{ill|Koushin|ja|1=Yang Wood Monkey|2=ja|甲申|1=Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koushin|13=User:Immanuelle/Yang Wood Monkey|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} is the 7th day (last day) of {{ill|Hanto|ja|犯土|lt=Small Earth|lt_ja=小土|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Hanto|1=Tsuchi (Japanese term)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11571306}} and the 1st day of {{ill|Shihoumoku|ja|十方暮|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shihoumoku|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}.

==See Also==
*{{prefix|qq=}}
*{{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Wood Monkey|qq=ja|甲申|version=84123774|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062011|af|Houtaap (astrologie)|cdo|Gák-sĭng|de|Holz-Affe|fr|Singe de bois|hak|Kap-sṳ̂n|ja|甲申|ko|갑신|nds|Holt-Aap|vi|Giáp Thân|za|Gyapsaen|zh-min-nan|Kap-sin|zh-yue|甲申|zh|甲申|zh-min-nan|Kap-chú|cdo|Gák-cṳ̄de|nds|Holt-Affenvi|de|Yang Wood Monkey|de|Holz-Affeneen|en|Wood Monkey|fr|Singe de boisboishak|it|Kap-chṳ́id|za|Gyapceij|ar|Yang Wood Monkey}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
